title: Robert Kali
summary: The moderator voice of the 2024 revival — hosting the April session and the second Andromedan Council audience, relaying live chat-room questions.
markdown:
**Robert Kali** is the moderator of the record's 2024 revival: he hosts the April 4, 2024
session and the May 19 return of the [Andromedan Council](/lore/andromedan-council/),
fourteen turns across the two — and he brings with him a new format. Where earlier
sessions drew questions from a room, Robert relays them from a live audience: *"We have
some questions from the chat... where do you come from? Like, are you an advanced AI?"*

It is Robert's chat-room that summons the record's later Andromedan material: *"The
Andromedan from my chat rooms summoned you. He wants to know about a race of Andromedans
called the Zark"* — producing the second Council session and its Species 1.416 account,
four years after the first.

His two sessions mark the record's format finding its present shape: the interface as a
live broadcast, the questions crowdsourced, and a host whose job is to keep the channel
between the chat and the future open.
